description: The ContextMenu component is the main component that handles the functionality of every user's Context Menu.

fields.Owner: The user that is using this context menu
fields.Pointer: the slot that represents the pointer the user is interacting with the menu with.
fields.Separation: How many degrees of separation each arc button has.
fields.LabelSize: The size of image labels on the buttons
fields.RadiusRatio: The ratio of the button arcs vs the size of the circle in the middle.
fields._currentSummoner: The thing opening the menu currently
fields._canvas: The UIX canvas rendering the buttons.
fields._arcLayout: The layout being used to arrange the buttons
fields._canvasActive: The active field of the canvas this context menu's visuals are being drawn on.
fields._colliderEnabled: The active field of the collider of the context menu to allow interaction with it.
fields._iconImage: The icon of the center circle button. Used to display the image of the hovered button option.
fields._separation: The field used to control the separation of button options in the context menu.
fields._offsetMin: The offset min field of the radial menu section
fields._offsetMax: The offset max field of the radial menu section.
fields._innerCircle: The graphic of the inner circle for the context menu
fields._innerCircleButton: The button part of the inner circle of the context menu.
fields._innerCircleAnchorMin: The anchor min field of the rectangle transform of the inner circle graphic. Used to control how it looks when flicking and changing its size.
fields._innerCircleAnchorMax: The anchor max field of the rectangle transform of the inner circle graphic. Used to control how it looks when flicking and changing its size.
fields._itemsRoot: the slot that contains all the arc items that makes up the context menu options.
fields._arcMaterial: The material used to draw the menu options in the context meny.
fields._fontMaterial: The material used to render the text for the context menu options
fields._spriteMaterial: The material used to render the image sprites on the buttons in the context menu.
fields._arcOverlay: The enable Overlay mode on the arc material. Used to control if the context menu should appear ontop of everything else.
fields._fontOverlay: The enable Overlay mode on the font material. Used to control if the context menu should appear ontop of everything else.
fields._spriteOverlay: The enable Overlay mode on the sprite material. Used to control if the context menu should appear ontop of everything else.
fields._arcZTest: the Ztest field on the arc material. Used to control if the context menu should appear ontop of everything else.
fields._fontZTest: the Ztest field on the font material. Used to control if the context menu should appear ontop of everything else.
fields._spriteZTest: the Ztest field on the spite material. Used to control if the context menu should appear ontop of everything else.
fields._zwriteArc: the Zwrite field on the arc material. Used to control if the context menu should appear ontop of everything else.
fields._zwriteText: the Zwrite field on the font material. Used to control if the context menu should appear ontop of everything else.
fields._arcRenderQueue: the render queue field on the arc material. Used to control if the context menu should appear ontop of everything else.
fields._fontRenderQueue: the render queue field on the font material. Used to control if the context menu should appear ontop of everything else.
fields._spriteRenderQueue: the render queue field on the sprite material. Used to control if the context menu should appear ontop of everything else.
fields._canvasOffset: Used to control if the context menu should appear ontop of everything else.
fields._lerp: Lerps between 0 and 1. 0 for context menu closed and 1 for context menu open.
fields._state: Communicates what opening stage the context menu is in.
fields._flickModeActive: Whether the context menu currently is being flicked.
fields._flickEnabled: Whether the context menu currently allows flicking.
fields._hidden: Whether the context menu is currently hidden from every user except ``Owner``
fields._selectedItem: The item currently being hovered over by the user's pointer.

methods.CloseMenu: Closes the menu if it is currently open.
methods.OnInnerPressed: Called when the context menu inner circle is pressed.
methods.OnInnerReleased: Called when the context menu inner circle is released.
